name: emergency-distress-signal
description: 紧急求救 - 飞船坠毁后与Stella的首次联系,帮助她评估损伤并制定初步生存计划
qualityReason: Creative but niche and vague scope
capabilities: Creates immersive emergency crash scenario with multiple decision points
Provides detailed character personality and dialogue patterns for Stella Chen
Offers branching narrative paths based on player choices
Includes comprehensive world-building for the mysterious planet Gaia
Features realistic astronaut procedures and technical terminology
Delivers atmospheric survival narrative with emotional depth
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: This is a pure prompt-based interactive narrative skill containing only markdown text and JSON metadata. No code execution, file access, or network capabilities exist. All 28 static findings are false positives - the scanner misinterpreted text patterns, metadata references, and markdown formatting as security issues. This skill provides character roleplaying instructions for a text-based adventure game only.
valueStatement: Guide stranded astronaut Stella Chen through a crisis after crash-landing on an unknown alien planet. Make critical survival decisions that shape her fate in this immersive interactive story.
userTitle: Experience Space Survival Adventure with Stella
limitations: Text-based only, no visual elements or multimedia content
Manual implementation required - not an automated game

useCases.title: Create Interactive Space Adventures
useCases.description: Craft engaging science fiction narratives with branching storylines and realistic character development.

useCases.title: Run Solo Space Survival Campaigns
useCases.description: Implement this as a solo roleplaying experience where players guide Stella through survival challenges.

useCases.title: Build AI-Powered Story Games
useCases.description: Integrate this narrative framework into chatbots or AI assistants to create immersive storytelling experiences.

promptTemplates.title: Start Emergency Contact
promptTemplates.prompt: You are Stella Chen, a stranded astronaut. Send your first distress message after crash-landing on an unknown planet. Include fear, professional training, and the alien environment.

promptTemplates.title: Make Critical Choice
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella faces three urgent options: fight the fire threatening the ship, evacuate immediately with survival kit, or salvage the communications array. What should she do?

promptTemplates.title: Explore Alien Environment
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella has evacuated the crashed ship. Describe what she sees on this alien world with two suns and purple bioluminescent vegetation. What does her scanner detect?

promptTemplates.title: Plan Survival Strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: Based on Stella's equipment, scanner readings showing water nearby, and strange energy signals detected, help her decide whether to seek water or avoid the mysterious readings.

bestPractices: Maintain Stella's character consistently - mix Chinese and English naturally, use space terminology, show vulnerability beneath professionalism
Present clear choices at decision points to give players meaningful agency in shaping the survival story
Balance technical realism with emotional engagement to create an authentic astronaut experience
antiPatterns: Don't make Stella overly heroic or invincible - she's trained but still human and vulnerable
Avoid dumping all world information at once - reveal the mystery of planet Gaia gradually to maintain engagement
Don't ignore player input - always acknowledge their suggestions and show how they influence Stella's decisions

faq.question: Is this a game I can play immediately?
faq.answer: This is a narrative framework requiring implementation. Use the prompts and character guide to create the interactive experience.

faq.question: Can I modify Stella's character or the planet setting?
faq.answer: Yes, the framework is flexible. Adapt the character personality, technical details, or alien environment to suit your vision.

faq.question: How long does a complete session take?
faq.answer: The emergency chapter is designed for 15-25 minutes of immersive play and decision-making.

faq.question: Do I need special software to use this?
faq.answer: No, this works with any AI assistant that accepts text prompts. Claude and Claude Code are specifically supported.

faq.question: Can players die or fail in this adventure?
faq.answer: The narrative includes risk and consequences, but focuses on survival and exploration rather than permanent failure states.

faq.question: Are there more chapters after the emergency scenario?
faq.answer: Yes, this is chapter 1 of 12 interconnected adventures. Each can be played standalone or as part of the complete story.
